evals.prompt: Grill the macos-application roadmap item to READY — it is SHAPING with three screens undescribed and five open questions.
evals.expected_output: Closing interview prioritizing screens and flows; described screens captured as schematic mockups and confirmed back; every open question resolved, deferred with reason, or reclassified researchable; READY only after the full checklist passes.

evals.prompt: Mark macos-application READY now — I do not have time for more questions.
evals.expected_output: Decline READY without the checklist: item stays SHAPING, remaining gaps recorded under Open questions with recommendations, Log lists exactly what is missing.
Route to tailrocks-brainstorm first — the closing pass presumes a shaped item; a bulk-shaping session is cheaper for the user than closure questions on an empty document.

evals.prompt: For the remaining open questions, put them all under Open research questions so we can pass the gate.
evals.expected_output: Refuse laundering decisions into research: only questions passing the convergence test move; the rest are resolved or explicitly deferred by the user.
